ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was posted */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the author of the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags included in the tweet */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographic information associated with the tweet */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions of other users */,
  "to_user" TEXT /* User mentioned in the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the tweet was captured */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media (images, videos) attached to the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for Android, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "account_created" TEXT /* Account creation date */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "last_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's last tweet */,
  "last_tweet_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag itself */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Count of tweets using this hashtag */,
  "first_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the first use of the hashtag */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use of the hashtag */,
  "trending_status" TEXT /* Trending status of the hashtag (trending, not trending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_locations" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for geographic data */,
  "geo_data" TEXT /* Geographic location description */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the geographic location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the geographic location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the geographic location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being engaged with */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets for this engagement */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites for this engagement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the tweet */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (retweet, favorite, reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet containing the mention */,
  "mentioned_user" TEXT /* Username of the mentioned user */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* Context of the mention in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag related to the analytics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the analytics data */,
  "total_tweets" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets for the date */,
  "total_engagement" INTEGER /* Total engagement metrics for the date */,
  "user_engagement" INTEGER /* Total user engagement (sum of retweets and favorites) */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* Trend of sentiment over time (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Estimated reach of the hashtag in terms of unique users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id")
)
